chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-236 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1) For orders on M.A No.1758/25 (urgency). 2) For orders on office objections. 3) For orders on M.A No.1759/25. 4) For hearing of main case. 14.03.2025. Syed Gohar Ali Shah, Advocate for applicant/accused. *_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_* Counsel for the applicant/accused is seeking Protective Bail for applicant/accused Sumair Iqbal Memon s/o Iqbal Ahmed Memon in Crime No.03 of 2018 registered at Police Station ACE PS Kotri U/s 409, 468, 471, 477-A, 34 PPC r/w Section 5 Act II 1947. The learned counsel for the applicant/accused submits that the applicant/accused apprehends his arrest at the hands of police officials although the applicant/accused wants to surrender himself before the learned trial court, therefore, he seeks protective bail. Be that as it may, this is a case of protective bail, which is hereby granted to the applicant/accused in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court for a period of Seven days. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender himself and join the investigation within stipulated time. Needless to say that this order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of Seven days or when the applicant/accused surrenders before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier and during such period the N.B.Ws, if any, issued by the Trial Court shall remain suspended. In case applicant/accused fails to appear/surrender before the concerned court within the stipulated period, the surety furnished by him before this court shall automatically stands forfeited.

Needless to say that this order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of Seven days or when the applicant/accused surrenders before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier and during such period the N.B.Ws, if any, issued by the Trial Court shall remain suspended. In case applicant/accused fails to appear/surrender before the concerned court within the stipulated period, the surety furnished by him before this court shall automatically stands forfeited. This Protective Bail Application along with pending applications stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ali.
